query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_auth.tenants (
                id,
                name, 
                user_name, 
                parent_tenant_id, 
                created_at, 
                updated_at
            ) 
             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
             ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
                name = VALUES(name),
                user_name = VALUES(user_name), 
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
